titlestmt.titleproper: Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program records21-24-3292
titlestmt.author: Compiled by N/A

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-07-23 18:13:08 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell Cooperative Extension. Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Photographs, Subject Files, Reports, Videotapes, Slides.
did.abstract: Includes reports, correspondence, in-service projects, subject files, photographs, videotapes, slides, and curriculum material pertaining to this federal nutrition program (EFNEP). Sponsored by Cornell Cooperative Extension, including records on WIC.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes reports, correspondence, in-service projects, subject files, photographs, videotapes, slides, nutrition educators training material and curriculum material pertaining to this federal nutrition program (EFNEP. Sponsored by Cornell Cooperative Extension including records on WIC.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIAL
relatedmaterial.p: See also collections #21-24-1975, Cornell University Cooperative Extension Records; #29-4-2733 Division of Nutritional Sciences Cooperative Extension Nutrition Program Records; and #29-1-3247, Division of Nutritional Sciences Records for related material.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. County (Data) Year End Reports Boxes: 1-4
Series II. Updates and Inservices Box: 5
Series IV. Narrative Reports, Progress Reports-Issues by Topic Boxes: 7-9
Series V. Conferences and Workshops Boxes: 8, 9
Series VI. Publications and Resources Boxes: 8-13
Series VII. Slides, Photographs, and Videos Boxes: 7, 9, 10

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program, records #21-24-3292. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes cassette tapes from New York City in English and Spanish on the topics of snacks, morning and afternoon 24 hour recall, milk, fruits and vegetables, feeding your young, food in the morning and shopping tips

did.unittitle: New York State EFNEP Food Stamp Pilot Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Tapes in English and Spanish produced in New York City, Steuben, Erie and Wayne counties and include the following topics: snacks, morning and afternoon 24 hour recall, milk, fruits and vegetables, feeding young kids, food in the morning and shopping tips.
